channel.title: The K-Beauty Data Desk
channel.description: I read all the reviews so you don't have to. Honest, data-backed takes on Korea's best-selling skincare.

item.title: Wellage 100 Ampoule: What 8,410 Real Reviews Actually Say (2026)
item.description: Wellage 100 Ampoule: 4.8★ from 8,410 Korean reviews (89% five-star). Who it suits, who should skip, and where to buy.

item.title: Mediheal Madecassoside Blemish Repair Serum: What 41,806 Real Reviews Actually Say (2026)
Anua PDRN Hyaluronic Acid Capsule 100 Serum Mask: What 18,867 Real Reviews Actually Say (2026)
